examples: Even unpaid work for charity is better than nothing.
Apart from a small team of paid staff, the organization consists of unpaid volunteers.
The mayor delivered the unwelcome news that city employees may have to take unpaid time off.
Even though most of its young workforce is unpaid, the can-do attitude is catching.
He then groveled for an unpaid summer internship at Brooklyn Brewery: long days of mashing, fermenting and brewing.
